case_title: SHUI YEE CHUNG VS. SHANGHAI 1930 RESTAURANT PARTNERS, L.P., A et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHUNG, SHUI YEE AS TO DEFENDANT SHANGHAI 1930 RESTAURANT PARTNERS, L.P., A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP GEORGE Q.
